channel.title: game on Wayne Cater
channel.description: Recent content in game on Wayne Cater

item.title: Tessera, the tile puzzle game
item.description: When I was a kid my maternal grandmother had theses little plastic tile games around her business. She would let me play with them when I visited. They were just a series of white tiles with black numbers. Tessera, Latin for tile, is web based version of those little tile games of the past. I had written a Swift/SwiftUI version but never released it. The premise is simple, slide the tiles into order to complete the puzzle.
